name: accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of billing records with payment receipts.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of billing records with payment receipts.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
